---
title: "Ants"
description: "Logs, experiments, and code relating to ants"
listing:
  contents: "."                # Look inside this current folder for posts
  sort: "date desc"            # Sort chronologically, newest first
  type: default                # Grid or list style options: default, grid, table
  categories: true             # Allow sidebar tag filtering within this project
---

Ants are amazing. How do they do so much with such little individual capability? We investigate.
